Description:
Business transformation with AI agents requires more than tools. It requires a new operating model. The Microsoft Agent Factory program is designed to help organizations move from experimentation to execution faster with role-based AI tools and training, deep expertise, and a single pre-paid plan.

Learn more at: https://msft.it/6057QCwa3
